category_sources: Official GitHub repository is for mdxmini/mdxplay.
source_facts.description says it plays music in X68000 MDX chiptune format.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mistydemeo/mdxmini, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
